propositions: Every local mutating event envelope must be stamped with denormalized author_email plus an optional author_id linking to a ddbe identity when one resolves.

Attribution is stamped at four local composer sites (append_event, txn cores, delete writers, compact snapshot builders) via an optional attribution dict, excluding the inbound Jira reconciler which attributes to external authors.
author_id is omitted from the envelope and reduced state when resolve_current_identity returns None, and present when an identity is set.
attribution_fields uses a module-level cache keyed by canonical realpath repo_root so git-email and identity resolution run at most once per repo_root per process.
Reducers surface author_email/author_id present-only at the same structural location author already lives (top-level create, per-comment, per-revert, per-signature).

Pre-change events lacking author_email/author_id must reduce byte-identical to compiled state with neither key, preserving replay back-compat, and author_email() must return empty string without raising on git failure.
